notes: Open-source TypeScript AI agent framework from the ex-Gatsby team (YC-backed, 1.0 in early 2026). Coined name; etymology undocumented. Dominant English reading is MASS-truh — short A as in 'master', stress on the first syllable. A spelling-pronunciation MAH-struh is sometimes heard; no documented creator FAQ resolves it, hence community-consensus. STRESS: MASS-truh.
